name: NewsAPI
what_it_does: Aggregates news articles and headlines from 150,000+ sources worldwide via a simple REST API.
use_cases: Fetching top headlines by country or category
Searching news articles by keyword or topic
not_for: Production apps on free developer plan (100 req/day limit)
Real-time breaking news (articles delayed on free tier)
Full article text (returns description/snippet only, not full content)
best_when: Building news aggregation features that need broad source coverage with simple keyword or category filtering.
avoid_when: You need full article body text, real-time feeds, or high request volume without a paid plan.

auth.notes: Single API key passed as query parameter or Authorization header

pricing.free_tier_limits: 100 requests/day, 1 month back, developer use only
pricing.notes: Developer plan is explicitly prohibited for production use; articles on free tier are delayed up to 24 hours

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON error responses with status codes and message fields; common errors well-documented
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only API; all requests are naturally idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: Free tier 100 req/day exhausted quickly by agents in loops
Full article text not returned; agents get truncated descriptions only
Developer plan prohibited for production; agents must flag this for deployment

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; API key has no scopes or granular permissions; key passed as query param risks logging exposure
